nasb.text: and although they know the ordinance of God, that those who practice such things are worthy of death, they not only do the same, but also give hearty approval to those who practice them.

esv.text: Though they know God’s righteous decree that those who practice such things deserve to die, they not only do them but give approval to those who practice them.

cnv.text: 他們雖然明明知道行這些事的人，　神判定他們是該死的，然而他們不單自己去行，也喜歡別人去行。

ccb.text: 他们明知，按上帝公义的法则，做这些事的人该死，不但执迷不悟，还喜欢别人跟他们同流合污。

csbs.text: 人虽然知道神的公义规定是：行这样事的人是该死的；然而他们不仅自己去做，还赞同做这些事的人。
